# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'my-application',
            description: 'Name of the Docker image to build'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Tag for the Docker image (e.g., latest, v1.0.0, dev)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: 'docker.io',
            description: 'Docker registry URL (e.g., docker.io, gcr.io/my-project, 123456789.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'docker-registry-credentials',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for the Docker registry'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Path to the Dockerfile context directory'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'Dockerfile',
            description: 'Name of the Dockerfile'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'PUSH_IMAGE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Push the image to the registry after building'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'USE_CACHE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Use Docker build cache'
        )
    }

    environment {
        FULL_IMAGE_NAME = "${params.REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_NAME}:${params.IMAGE_TAG}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.IMAGE_NAME?.trim()) {
                        error('IMAGE_NAME parameter is required and cannot be empty')
                    }
                    if (!params.IMAGE_TAG?.trim()) {
                        error('IMAGE_TAG parameter is required and cannot be empty')
                    }
                    if (!params.REGISTRY_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('REGISTRY_URL parameter is required and cannot be empty')
                    }
                    echo "=== Build Configuration ==="
                    echo "Registry URL:    ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                    echo "Image Name:      ${params.IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Image Tag:       ${params.IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "Full Image:      ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Dockerfile:      ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}/${params.DOCKERFILE_NAME}"
                    echo "Push Image:      ${params.PUSH_IMAGE}"
                    echo "Use Cache:       ${params.USE_CACHE}"
                    echo "==========================="
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def cacheFlag = params.USE_CACHE ? '' : '--no-cache'

                    echo "Building Docker image: ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"

                    sh """
                        docker build \
                            ${cacheFlag} \
                            -f ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}/${params.DOCKERFILE_NAME} \
                            -t ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME} \
                            ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}
                    """

                    echo "Docker image built successfully: ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "docker inspect ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    sh "docker history ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"

                    def imageSize = sh(
                        script: "docker image inspect ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME} --format='{{.Size}}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()

                    def imageSizeMB = (imageSize as Long) / (1024 * 1024)
                    echo "Image size: ${String.format('%.2f', imageSizeMB)} MB"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Login to Registry') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PUSH_IMAGE }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USERNAME',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASSWORD'
                    )]) {
                        sh """
                            echo "\${REGISTRY_PASSWORD}" | docker login ${params.REGISTRY_URL} \
                                --username "\${REGISTRY_USERNAME}" \
                                --password-stdin
                        """
                        echo "Successfully logged in to registry: ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PUSH_IMAGE }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Pushing Docker image: ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"

                    sh "docker push ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"

                    echo "Docker image pushed successfully: ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Tag Additional Latest') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PUSH_IMAGE && params.IMAGE_TAG != 'latest' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def latestTag = "${params.REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_NAME}:latest"

                    echo "Tagging image as latest: ${latestTag}"
                    sh "docker tag ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME} ${latestTag}"
                    sh "docker push ${latestTag}"

                    echo "Latest tag pushed successfully: ${latestTag}"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo 'Cleaning up local Docker images...'

                sh "docker rmi ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME} || true"

                if (params.IMAGE_TAG != 'latest') {
                    sh "docker rmi ${params.REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_NAME}:latest || true"
                }

                sh "docker logout ${params.REGISTRY_URL} || true"
            }
        }
        success {
            echo """
            ===========================================
            Docker Image Build & Push Successful!
            ===========================================
            Registry:  ${params.REGISTRY_URL}
            Image:     ${params.IMAGE_NAME}
            Tag:       ${params.IMAGE_TAG}
            Full Path: ${FULL_IMAGE_NAME}
            Pushed:    ${params.PUSH_IMAGE}
            ===========================================
            """
        }
        failure {
            echo """
            ===========================================
            Docker Image Build & Push Failed!
            ===========================================
            Please check the logs for details.
            Registry:  ${params.REGISTRY_URL}
            Image:     ${params.IMAGE_NAME}
            Tag:       ${params.IMAGE_TAG}
            ===========================================
            """
        }
    }
}
